title: Genetic spectrum and risk factor analysis for drug-resistant of early-onset epilepsy
abstract_snippet: 75 infants with early-onset epilepsy. Drug-resistant group: 71.4% had definitive genetic dx. Recurrent variants in KCNQ2 and SCN2A.
summary: 75 infants with early-onset epilepsy stratified by drug resistance. 71.4% of drug-resistant cases had definitive genetic diagnosis vs 37.5% non-refractory (p=0.003). Recurrent variants in KCNQ2 and SCN2A. Relevant to epilepsy-genetics connection and ion channel genes in the atlas set.
